ModuleTitle.helper: Used by OpenContent and DNN module settings. This is not displayed to site visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

SectionTitle.helper: Optional. Renders as the section h3. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.

SectionDescription.helper: Optional short text shown below the section title. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.
SectionDescription.placeholder: Guide visitors to the next helpful page with image-based navigation cards.

NavigationCards.helper: Required. Add as many cards as you want. Only the first 2 cards are rendered on the website.

Title.helper: Required. Main title shown on the card. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.

Eyebrow.helper: Optional small label shown above the title. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.

Image.helper: Required. Use a wide landscape image. Recommended minimum: 1600 x 1000 px.

Link.helper: Required. Choose where this navigation card should go.
